name: My LA lawyer admitted AI referral—what next steps?
description: Terminate, complain, document; CA tight timelines.[3]

mainEntity.name: My LA lawyer admitted AI referral—what next steps?

acceptedAnswer.text: Terminate, complain, document; CA tight timelines.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: Demand full disclosure, case file, and consider terminating; file bar complaint if harmed. CA ethics mirror NY's AI scrutiny.[3] Key factors: CA 1-year discovery limit for malpractice. Document admission. Seek second opinion fast.
